title: jasione crispa subsp. sessiliflora
intro: Jasione crispa subsp. sessiliflora, also known as the Cornflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Jasione crispa subsp. sessiliflora include its ability to treat urinary tract issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
